notes: Formalises Silverman IV.3.1–IV.3.2 (additive/multiplicative formal groups and their associated groups) and IV.6.1 (torsion p-power theorem); all 35 declarations are sorry-free and axiom-clean. The file is not imported by any other project file (only the top-level HasseWeil.lean aggregator imports it), so all public declarations are effectively unused within the project beyond that barrel import. The nsmul/formal-[n] bridge (nsmul_val, ~80 lines) uses the MvPowerSeries substitution bridge eval₂_subst_bridge as its central technical tool.
